overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking along a snow-dusted waterfront promenade beside modern apartment buildings, then turning to face a partially frozen harbor with distant residential buildings across the water. The clip features game engine graphics with controller button prompts visible at the bottom of the screen.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a snow-dusted waterfront promenade. A modern multi-story apartment building runs along the right side, while a partially frozen harbor stretches to the left. The sky is clear and blue. A title text overlay appears briefly at the start before disappearing, leaving an unobstructed view of the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor view with distant residential skyline

events.description: camera begins turning left to face the frozen harbor and distant buildings
view transitions from building-lined path to open waterfront panorama

agents.ego_description: turning left to observe the expansive frozen harbor and residential buildings across the water

entered.detail: cluster of low-rise residential buildings visible across the frozen harbor

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left away from the apartment building to face the open harbor. The view opens up to show the expansive frozen water surface with snow patterns, and a distant residential complex becomes visible across the harbor. The concrete promenade remains visible in the right foreground as the camera completes its pan to focus on the distant skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that shifts from a walk along a residential waterfront to a wide panoramic view of a frozen harbor. It begins by moving forward along a snow-dusted promenade, flanked by a modern multi-story apartment building on the right and the edge of the water on the left under a clear blue sky. As a brief title overlay disappears, the camera begins to pivot away from the architecture to face the open expanse of the harbor. The scene then opens up to reveal the frozen water surface marked by intricate snow patterns, with the concrete path receding into the right foreground. Finally, the pan completes as the view settles on a distant residential complex silhouetted against the horizon across the ice.
